title: Mirroring and connecting tasks
excerpt: When a board is mirroring another board - it is a laborious and time consuming task to connect each task to the original board especially when the  board is for projects for the entire year.  And, what is even more annoy…

posts.author: redbarn (Tracy Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: When a board is mirroring another board - it is a laborious and time consuming task to connect each task to the original board especially when the board is for projects for the entire year. And, what is even more annoying, when I am in a group and have selected the task to connect/mirror - after selecting it - the work space defaults to the first group and then you have to scroll down to find the correct one and click. This takes huge amounts of stupid time.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tracy,

I understand where you’re coming from here! I’d love to understand how you’d ideally like this the columns to function? I can take your suggestions directly to our product team and see whether any changes are on our future roadmap
